prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: near-foreground moving branch cutout for scene 2 of a 16:9 Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style sample and defines paper texture and muted plant colors
Primary request: one wind-bent bamboo branch sweeping in from the upper-left and one small rock-grass cluster at bottom-right; center and subtitle band remain clear
Style/medium: handcrafted torn-paper silhouettes with fibrous edges and restrained ink
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background
Constraints: uniform background, no shadow, gradient or texture; no #ff00ff in subject; no people, text, watermark, logo; complete crisp cutout
Avoid: decorative frame, dense foliage, photorealism
